title: Container Report - Week 24
summary:
Main
Container rates held on to their gains of previous weeks due to early peak season demand and shippers frontloading ahead of potential tariff hikes. On the main East West Lanes prices maintained their levels during the second week of June, with US West Coast prices FBX01 (China/East Asia - USA West Coast) ending the week at $5,947/FEU, down marginally from its high of $6,015/FEU at the same time last week. Meanwhile East Coast FBX03 (China/East Asia - USA East Coast) finished the week at $7,124/FEU up from $7,090 the week before.
